items.name: 小山評定跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 慶長5年（1600年）の小山評定の跡地。小山市役所前に「小山評定跡」の石柱が立つ。

en.name_en: Site of the Oyama Council of War
en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1964-05-14. It is located at Chūōchō, Oyama City.

items.name: 篠塚稲荷神社塚古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 大本 篠塚稲荷神社
items.description: 6世紀半ば頃の前方後円墳。墳長62メートル。大本古墳群では最古・最大。

en.name_en: Mound Tumulus at Shinozuka Inari Shrine
en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1965-04-27. It is located at Shinozuka Inari Shrine, Ōmoto.

items.name: 飯塚一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 壬生通り（日光西街道）の飯塚宿と壬生宿の間に設けられた一里塚。道路両側に二つの塚が残る（東側は昭和56年に修復）。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1965-09-03. It is located at Iizuka, Oyama City.

items.name: 神鳥谷曲輪跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 13世紀後半から15世紀の小山氏の居館跡と考えられる。掘立柱建物跡3棟、井戸跡20基確認。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 2007-12-28. It is located at Hitchigoya, Oyama City.

items.name: 外城2号墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 6世紀後半築造、地下式横穴式石室を持つ円墳。直径約20メートル。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1979-10-01. It is located at Tojō (privately owned).

items.name: 横倉戸館古墳群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 横倉字戸館に所在。1から6号墳まで残存する円墳群。1号墳は古墳時代前期（4世紀）の円墳と判明。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at Yokokura (privately owned).

items.name: 小山ゴルフクラブ内古墳群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 喜沢 小山カントリークラブ
items.description: 喜沢古墳群の一部。古墳5基現存、帆立貝式前方後円墳の桑57号墳を除く4基は円墳。

en.name_en: Tumulus Group within the Oyama Golf Club
en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at the Oyama Country Club, Kizawa.

items.name: 日光街道西一里塚
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 喜沢 小山カントリークラブ
items.description: 壬生通りにある一里塚。東西両側2基の塚は直径約3.3メートル、高さ約1.8メートル。

en.name_en: West Milestone Mound of the Nikkō Highway
en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at the Oyama Country Club, Kizawa.

items.name: 東島田10号墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東島田 日本聖公会北関東教区
items.description: 直径25メートル、高さ2メートルの円墳。地下式の横穴式石室を持つと思われる。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at Higashishimada (Kita-Kantō Diocese of the Nippon Sei Ko Kai).

items.name: 寒沢古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 直径20メートル、高さ3.5メートルの円墳。墳頂部に稲荷神社が祀られる。寒沢遺跡。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at Otome (privately owned).

items.name: 中妻古墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 6世紀築造と思われる帆立貝式前方後円墳。全長32メートル。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1983-02-01. It is located at Otome (privately owned).

items.name: 飯塚35号墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 飯塚古墳群の1基。墳長40メートルほどの西面する前方後円墳の後円部残丘。6世紀後半築造。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1988-11-28. It is located at Iizuka, Oyama City.

items.name: 宮内5号墳
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 宮内古墳群の一つ。南北長35.2メートル、東西長32.6メートル、高さ3.7メートルの2段築成の方墳。7世紀築造。

en.description_en: A monument in the municipally designated historic site subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1998-02-03. It is located at Awanomiya, Oyama City.

items.name: 南飯田の神田囃子
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：11月14日に近い日曜日。南飯田神田囃子保存会が継承。五段囃子に合わせて獅子舞等が行われる。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1964-05-14. It is located in the Minamiiida district.

items.name: 篠塚初午祭
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：3月第2日曜日。飾り馬を神社に参向させ、流鏑馬が行われる。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1965-08-27. It is located at Shinozuka Inari Shrine.

items.name: 白鳥八幡宮古式祭礼
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：旧暦の1月11日。「鬼面射弓」が行われる古式豊かな例祭。

en.name_en: Traditional Festival of Shiratori Hachiman Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1965-08-30. It is located at Shiratori Hachiman Shrine.

items.name: 田間血方神社神楽
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：4月第2土曜日・日曜日。「岩戸の舞」を中心とした10の演目からなる神楽。

en.name_en: Kagura Dance of Tama Chikata Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1967-04-20. It is located at Tama Chikata Shrine.

items.name: 花桶かつぎ
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：1月第4土曜日。7歳の女の子が花桶をかつぎ寒川地内を歩く習俗。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1973-03-11. It is located along the route from Ryūju-ji Temple to Munakata Shrine.

items.name: 高椅神社の神楽
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：10月第1土曜日。太々神楽（吉田流）、12座の神代神楽。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1984-03-01. It is located at Takahashi Shrine.

items.name: 篠塚稲荷神社の神楽
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：11月23日。太々神楽の一つ。現在10座を伝承。

en.name_en: Kagura Dance of Shinozuka Inari Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1984-03-01. It is located at Shinozuka Inari Shrine.

items.name: 安房神社の太々神楽
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：大晦日から元旦、4月第2日曜日。伊勢誉田流、12座から成る。

en.name_en: Daidai Kagura Dance of Awa Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1988-02-10. It is located at Awa Shrine.

items.name: アワガラ神輿の習俗
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：11月21日。屋根にアワガラを差し込んだ神輿を氏子地域に巡行する行事。

en.name_en: Custom of the Awagara Portable Shrine
en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1993-02-01. It is located at Awa Shrine.

items.name: 中河原の廻り地蔵
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：通年。「巡行仏」信仰の一つ。県内でも数例しか残されていない。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1998-02-27. It is located within the Nakagawara district.

items.name: ナムジゾウの習俗
items.category: 民俗文化財
items.description: 祭礼日時：中村地区8月12日と17日、発戸地区8月17日から23日まで。辻固めを行う信仰行事。大字大本の中村地区・大字下初田の発戸地区の2地区が指定。

en.description_en: A folk cultural property in the intangible folk cultural property subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 2004-12-21. It is located within the Nakamura and Hotto districts.

items.name: 公孫樹
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 本郷町1丁目（城山公園内）
items.description: 員数：1本。小山落城の際投身自殺した姫君の霊がやどるとの伝説が残る。

en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1965-12-21. It is located within Shiroyama Park, Hongōchō 1-chōme.

items.name: 小宅八幡宮のカヤ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢500年余と推定。御神木として保存。

en.name_en: Nutmeg-Yew Tree of Ojaku Hachiman Shrine
en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1968-01-09. It is located at Ojaku, Oyama City.

items.name: ナウマン象 第3臼歯化石
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1点。小山市間中の思川段丘崖から出土したナウマン象の下あご左第3大臼歯。約15万年から20万年前のもの。

en.name_en: Fossil Third Molar of a Naumann's Elephant
en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1972-10-02. It is located at the Oyama City Museum.

items.name: 愛宕神社のケヤキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢600年と推定。小山義政が康暦元年（1379年）愛宕神社勧請時に御神木として植えたとの言い伝え。

en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1972-12-18. It is located at Miyamotochō, Oyama City.

items.name: 安房神社のモミ群落
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 当地域平野部には稀にみる自然植生（天然的状態の自然林）。

en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument subcategory. It is municipally designated by Oyama City and was designated on 1976-08-01. It is located at Awanomiya, Oyama City.

items.name: 間々田八幡宮のコナラ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：3本。推定120年以上の陰樹のコナラ古木。混交林から極相林への経過を知る教材として貴重。

en.name_en: Konara Oak of Mamada Hachimangu Shrine
en.description_en: A natural monument (a konara oak tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1980-05-01. Located in Mamada, Oyama City.

items.name: 間々田八幡宮のスギ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢300年以上と推定。樹幹が途中から分枝し落雷の跡がある。

en.description_en: A natural monument (a Japanese cedar tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1980-05-01. Located in Mamada, Oyama City.

items.name: 田中家のツゲ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢200年以上の古木。個人所有のため見学には許可が必要。

en.description_en: A natural monument (a boxwood tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1980-05-01. Located in Minamiiida, Oyama City.

items.name: 天翁院のコウヤマキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢400年以上と推定。防火樹または仏事に関係ある樹木として植栽されたと考えられる。

en.description_en: A natural monument (an umbrella pine tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1985-05-01. Located in Hongo-cho, Oyama City.

items.name: 福地家のケヤキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：4本。樹齢300年以上と推定。門前左右に2本ずつ計4本。個人所有のため見学には許可が必要。

en.description_en: A natural monument (a zelkova tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1988-11-28. Located in Nishikuroda, Oyama City.

items.name: 鷲神社参道のスギ並木と境内のシラカシ2本
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 参道両側で約160本程度のスギ、社殿両側にシラカシ1本ずつ。樹齢300年から500年と推定される老木も含む。

en.name_romaji: Washi-jinja Sandō no Suginamiki to Keidai no Shirakashi Nihon
en.name_en: Cedar Avenue on the Approach to Washi Shrine and Two Ring-cupped Oaks in the Precincts
en.description_en: A natural monument (a cedar-lined approach and two ring-cupped oak trees). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1988-11-28. Located in Tojo, Oyama City.

items.name: 国府神社のケヤキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：1本。樹齢400年以上と推定。根張りもケヤキ本来の形をよく表している。

en.description_en: A natural monument (a zelkova tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1988-11-28. Located in Shimokofuzuka, Oyama City.

items.name: 日枝神社のケヤキ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 員数：3本。日枝神社参道の3本のケヤキ。樹齢400年以上と推定。

en.description_en: A natural monument (a zelkova tree). Municipally designated by Oyama City on 1993-05-01. Located in Kizawa, Oyama City.
